'''Thrass''' was a [[city]] located on the [[moon]] of [[Lupal]]. After the collapse of the civilization on Lupal and the abandonment of the moon by the few survivors, Thrass fell into ruin.<ref name="Blood Moon" />

{{City-stub}}
